problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerPhiGovDispatchAuthorizationWitness requires effect reconciliation before terminal closure, but the selected read-only worker path lacks a schema-backed witness request that names the reconciliation evidence without enabling runtime authority.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerEffectReconciliationWitness validates against a JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the upstream Phi_gov dispatch authorization witness and runtime dispatch admission witness
the witness requires reconciliation of runtime dispatch state, worker invocation state, runtime receipt state, WorkerFailureReceipt state, and receipt append state before terminal closure

the witness keeps effect reconciliation uncollected and keeps runtime dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, filesystem writes, connector calls, network calls, secrets, success claims, and terminal closure denied
focused tests reject authority drift, effect-boundary drift, remaining-witness drift, missing evidence refs, mutation-route payloads, credential-like payloads, malformed payloads, and CLI JSON drift
non_goals: do not observe an active runtime lease
do not perform UAO dispatch authorization
do not perform Phi_gov dispatch authorization
do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not grant filesystem, connector, network, terminal closure, or success-claim authority
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only
terminal closure remains blocked until governed worker effect reconciliation evidence exists
all new artifacts must remain deterministic and read-only
evidence_required: upstream Phi_gov dispatch authorization witness validation
upstream runtime dispatch admission witness validation
